description: External build tools required by dawn-builder. CMake + Ninja drive the Dawn island-build via packages/dawn-builder/scripts/repo/build.mts.

cmake.description: CMake build system generator. Dawn's CMakeLists.txt is the island-build entry; we use the cmake CLI to configure and drive Ninja.

ninja.description: Ninja build system. Dawn's CMake setup generates Ninja files for fast parallel builds.
